metadata.method_name: Mode-A: closure-certified composition over disjunctive LLM reads (matched-coverage showdown)

data_provenance.note: gold atomic relations read off the realization model; query DEDUCTION-REQUIRED

H3_iteration_real.metric_note: 'full'/'naive' = resolve-to-CORRECT-singleton rate; 'full_cov'/'naive_cov' = resolve-to-singleton (coverage) rate. The iteration advantage of full PC over naive single-pass shows as a positive coverage gap on hop>=3 / cyclomatic>=1 (naive single-pass only sees length-2 paths) and a ZERO gap on length-2.

H3_iteration_gold.metric_note: 'full'/'naive' = resolve-to-CORRECT-singleton rate; 'full_cov'/'naive_cov' = resolve-to-singleton (coverage) rate. The iteration advantage of full PC over naive single-pass shows as a positive coverage gap on hop>=3 / cyclomatic>=1 (naive single-pass only sees length-2 paths) and a ZERO gap on length-2.

C2_on_vs_off.note: OFF never reads the query edge locally (s,t never co-occur), so its single-relation coverage is 0; Mode-A coverage IS the deduction-required bite recovered by the composition floor.

audit.interpretation: On all-sound networks Mode-A's closed query SET must contain gold (soundness of PC) -> zero-FP-conditional-on-soundness ~1.0; silent-wrong arises ONLY from unsound reads.

reads.sentence: The shareholder vote came after the maintenance window.
The shareholder vote came after the network upgrade.
The vendor negotiation occurred before the maintenance window.
The vendor negotiation came before the network upgrade.

H3_iteration_real.metric_note: 'full'/'naive' = resolve-to-CORRECT-singleton rate; 'full_cov'/'naive_cov' = resolve-to-singleton (coverage) rate. The iteration advantage of full PC over naive single-pass shows as a positive coverage gap on hop>=3 / cyclomatic>=1 (naive single-pass only sees length-2 paths) and a ZERO gap on length-2.

H3_iteration_gold.metric_note: 'full'/'naive' = resolve-to-CORRECT-singleton rate; 'full_cov'/'naive_cov' = resolve-to-singleton (coverage) rate. The iteration advantage of full PC over naive single-pass shows as a positive coverage gap on hop>=3 / cyclomatic>=1 (naive single-pass only sees length-2 paths) and a ZERO gap on length-2.

C2_on_vs_off.note: OFF never reads the query edge locally (s,t never co-occur), so its single-relation coverage is 0; Mode-A coverage IS the deduction-required bite recovered by the composition floor.

audit.interpretation: On all-sound networks Mode-A's closed query SET must contain gold (soundness of PC) -> zero-FP-conditional-on-soundness ~1.0; silent-wrong arises ONLY from unsound reads.

reads.sentence: The recruitment drive and the venue booking began together, but the recruitment drive ended first.
The recruitment drive and the trademark dispute occurred over precisely the same interval.
The maintenance window and the venue booking ended together, but the maintenance window began later.
The maintenance window began exactly as the trademark dispute ended.
The design review and the curriculum update spanned exactly the same period.
The design review started at the very moment the board meeting finished.
The site inspection finished at the very moment the curriculum update started.
The site inspection and the board meeting ended together, but the site inspection began later.

verdict.headline: H1 CONFIRMED on all arms (Mode-A > PoT AND > SC at matched coverage, Holm). point: vs POT Δ=+0.043(sig), vs SC Δ=+0.146(sig) | allen: vs POT Δ=+0.676(sig), vs SC Δ=+0.641(sig)

cross_algebra_synthesis.finding: The closure advantage over neural per-path reasoning scales with relation-algebra richness: on the 3-relation convex point algebra a strong neural baseline (Path-of-Thoughts) already composes correctly, so Mode-A TIES it (gap~0) while still beating self-consistency; on the 13-relation Allen interval algebra (NP-hard consistency) neural per-path chaining collapses and Mode-A's symbolic closure dominates ALL baselines.

verdict.scope: REAL-LLM-READ-ON-SYNTHETIC; point=PC-complete exact arm, allen=NP-hard lower-bound generality

cost.note: cumulative_openrouter_usd is THIS final run's billed calls; total_openrouter_usd_all_runs_from_cache sums the cost field over every SHA-256 cache file (dev pilot + mini smoke + an interrupted/restarted test run + this run) = the authoritative total OpenRouter spend, well under the $9 hard cap.
